MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia M. Evezich. Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Da Vinci Group, and there being no appearance by Defendant, Christopher Klotz, the matter was removed from settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed,
